name: ASMedia Technology Inc.
summary: ASMedia Technology Inc. operates as a fabless IC design company. The company offers USB host and device controllers, including USB3.2 Gen1, USB 3.2 Gen2x1, USB 3.2 Gen2x2, and USB4 controllers; PCIe bridge and SATA controllers; and high speed signal switches. It serves motherboard vendors and branded OEMs worldwide. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
